summary_one_line: Input must decode to an Indic symbol-cluster syllable so the syllable_type switch reaches case indic_symbol_cluster.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Byte content that, after Indic-shaper categorization, yields a syllable whose low nibble equals indic_symbol_cluster; reached by broad havoc byte mutation that varies the codepoint/category bytes rather than by CMP substitution.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive resolves 10/10 with hitcount 88; its havoc/token stack (DwordAddMutator, ByteInterestingMutator, TokenReplace etc.) randomly perturbs the codepoint bytes and lands category-bearing inputs, e.g. the naive seed prefixed f3 a8 00 00 with long a2 runs.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog blocks 9/10 with hitcount 0; its added I2SRandReplace stage finds no input-byte CMP to substitute because syllable_type is an internal nibble classification, so I2S energy is wasted and naive's plain havoc out-explores it.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The syllable_type switch is a category dispatch, not an integer/string CMP against an input constant, so cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitution gains no traction; the win is plain havoc byte mutation (havoc-only) that naive spends fully on category exploration while cmplog dilutes effort on fruitless I2S.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same indic_symbol_cluster syllable requirement; value_profile_cmplog additionally gets CMP_MAP-bucket feedback that rewards partial progress in the comparisons feeding the categorization path.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 8/10 vs cmplog's 1/10 over the same branch; its instrumentation adds CMP_MAP gradient buckets on top of cmplog, giving a Hamming-distance signal cmplog lacks.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has only edge-bucket feedback and the I2S stage; with no gradient signal it stays blocked 9/10 at hitcount 0 while vpc advances.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The added technique vpc has over cmplog is the value_profile CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance feedback buckets), which rewards inputs closer to category-relevant comparison operands, enabling vpc to reach indic_symbol_cluster where bare cmplog cannot.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same indic_symbol_cluster syllable requirement, reached by splicing/recombining generalized token-and-gap structures from the corpus into a layout that decodes to symbol-cluster text.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: grimoire resolves 8/10 vs cmplog's 1/10; it adds a GeneralizationStage plus Grimoire structural mutators that recombine generalized byte runs, and the grimoire winning seeds show repeated structural motifs (f2 a8 00 00 ... patterns).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog lacks the generalization + structural mutators (it is grimoire's baseline minus those stages) and stays blocked 9/10 at hitcount 0.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire's added technique over its cmplog baseline is structural mutation: GeneralizationStage replaces concrete runs with gap placeholders and the Grimoire mutators splice/recurse on them, building category-bearing structures that cmplog's byte-local mutators do not assemble.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the case indic_symbol_cluster arm of a switch on an internally-computed syllable_type nibble, not an input-byte comparison.
The globally blocked side is the true branch at case indic_symbol_cluster.
naive wins the I2S pair, resolving 10/10 with hitcount 88 while cmplog blocks 9/10 at hitcount 0.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=88  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: naive winning seeds were produced by plain havoc/token mutators including DwordAddMutator and ByteInterestingMutator.
naive has no I2S stage, only havoc + token mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes operands at offsets matching a logged CMP operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds CMP_MAP gradient buckets on top of cmplog's stack.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog resolves 8/10 vs cmplog's 1/10 at this branch, delta attributed to value_profile.
grimoire adds a GeneralizationStage plus structural mutators on top of the cmplog stack.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
it includes the `CmpLogObserver`, the `TracingStage`, and the
`I2SRandReplace` (i2s) stage — and ADDS a `GeneralizationStage` plus
Grimoire structural mutators.

evidence_trail.claim: Grimoire mutators splice and recurse on generalized token/gap structures.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation).

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire winning seeds show a repeated f2 a8 00 00 structural motif.
grimoire resolves 8/10 vs cmplog's 1/10, delta attributed to grimoire_structural.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is havoc-only (for the I2S-direction pair naive>cmplog, where cmplog is the LOSER), not I2SRandReplace, so lineage verification is not mandatory; the winner here lacks I2S entirely (naive section: 'No I2S'), so there is no I2S floor to confirm. The other two hypotheses attribute to CMP_MAP gradient and grimoire structural respectively, neither of which is I2SRandReplace.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose switch dispatches on an input-byte integer compared against a literal (a true I2S CMP), where cmplog then BEATS naive at reaching the symbol arm, would refute the claim that the category dispatch denies cmplog any I2S traction here.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact byte-to-Indic-category mapping is not shown; the claim that winning seeds decode to indic_symbol_cluster syllables is inferred from hitcount/blocked counts and seed structure rather than a decoded categorization trace.
